testcase.name: StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /healthz > returns 200 for liveness
StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /info > returns 200 when platform info is enabled
StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /info > returns 403 when platform info is disabled
StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /metrics > returns 200 with Prometheus metrics when no IP allowlist is configured
StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /metrics > returns 403 when the client IP is outside the metrics allowlist
StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /readyz > returns 200 when downstream checks are healthy
StynxHealthController API error matrix > GET /readyz > returns 503 when a downstream readiness check is unhealthy
StynxHealthModule integration > exposes the expected health endpoints through the controller surface
StynxHealthModule integration > surfaces readiness failures as 503 errors
